title: eriolaena malvacea
intro: Eriolaena malvacea is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eriolaena malvacea include its ability to boost the immune system, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, with herbal preparations often involving decoctions or infusions made from the plant's roots or leaves.
